title: Organization · care_site core mapping
notes:
Branch dimension: how the Organization__care_site edge derives every produced care_site column from Organization.name + Organization.type.

Grounded in mapspec/views/Organization__care_site.view.json (stage 1) + mapspec/etl/Organization__care_site.sql (stage 2). Produced columns, in target order (care_site_id surrogate PK omitted from assertions):

  care_site_id                = hashtextextended(Organization.id, 0)::bigint   (== referenceToId(Organization.id), so asserted via ref:<id>)
  care_site_name              = Organization.name
  place_of_service_concept_id = CASE Organization.type[0].coding[0].code
                                  'prov' -> 8940    (Office)
                                  'dept' -> 4318944 (Hospital)
                                  'edu'  -> 4030303 (Hospital AND/OR institution)
                                  'govt' -> 4195901 (Government hospital)
                                  'team' -> 4217012 (Health maintenance organization)
                                  ELSE   -> 0
  location_id                 = NULL (always — the Organization edge never sets a care_site location; Location__care_site is a separate append edge)
  care_site_source_value      = Organization.id (the UUID — Encounter.serviceProvider references this directly)
  place_of_service_source_value = Organization.type[0].coding[0].code (raw HL7 organization-type code, NULL when type absent)

KEY MECHANICS:
- The view reads type via Organization.type.first().coding.first().code. So only the FIRST coding of the FIRST type element drives place_of_service; additional codings/types are ignored.
- place_of_service_concept_id is a pure inline CASE in stage-2 SQL (no ConceptMap / cm.* table for this edge). An unrecognized or absent type_code falls to ELSE 0; place_of_service_source_value still carries whatever raw code was present (or NULL when type[] is absent entirely).
- care_site_source_value is the Organization UUID — a traceability anchor back to the source record, NOT a clinical identifier (per project-wide *_source_value semantics). It is intentionally the raw v.id, never an Organization.identifier value.
- location_id is hard NULL in this edge regardless of any Organization.address — addresses are not consumed here.

Isolation note: the runner builds cdm_ours_fhir.care_site from BOTH Organization__care_site (truncate) and Location__care_site (append). These cases supply only Organization resources (no Location), so the Location edge contributes zero rows and care_site is asserted to contain exactly the Organization-derived rows.

Concept names verified live in vocab.concept (May 2026 Athena bundle): 8940 Office (domain Visit), 4318944 Hospital, 4030303 'Hospital AND/OR institution', 4195901 'Government hospital', 4217012 'Health maintenance organization' (the last four domain Observation). NOTE: the concept_name strings differ from the inline comments in the SQL (e.g. 4318944 is 'Hospital', not 'Department'); the __name siblings below use the real Athena concept_name.

The 'prov' variant uses a REAL Synthea Organization (NURSE ON CALL, 17a4bae5-...) and copies values straight from the live cdm_ours_fhir.care_site row (care_site_id -1961152856439230159 == referenceToId of that UUID). All 261 Synthea orgs are type 'prov'; the dept/edu/govt/team/other/no-type variants are synthetic (those org types never appear in Synthea) but exercise every CASE branch of the live SQL.

cases.desc: prov organization (real Synthea NURSE ON CALL) → place_of_service_concept_id 8940 Office; care_site_source_value = Org UUID; location_id NULL
dept organization → place_of_service_concept_id 4318944 (Hospital); raw code 'dept' kept in place_of_service_source_value
edu organization → 4030303 (Hospital AND/OR institution); exercises the 'edu' CASE branch
unrecognized type code 'ins' → CASE ELSE 0 for place_of_service_concept_id, but raw 'ins' is still preserved in place_of_service_source_value
organization with NAME but NO type[] → place_of_service_concept_id 0 AND place_of_service_source_value NULL (type_code is NULL → CASE ELSE 0); care_site_name + source_value still produced
